title: Ultimate Briddle Rail Pack
description: Fictional trains for ya! The Ultimate Briddle Rail Pack features fictional trains I drew for the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) mod.
body:
![Class 320](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3bc03a4f0752bd50a4e81fb054a6335cb17a5b3.png)
# It's the Ultimate Briddle Rail Pack!!!
What do we have? **Trains!** Where are them from? **Who knows! I just made them up!** What type of trains are there? **ANYTHING!!** From Commuter Trains to High Speed Trains, even to Locomotives and Freight Trains (Also ferries are here)! Anything you want is in this VERY PACK!
## Features:

Class 200 DEMU - Suitable for Regional services

Class 320 Commutra AC EMU - Suitable for Regional services

Class 420 Commutra DC EMU - Suitable for Commuter services

Class 400 DC EMU - Suitable for shuttle services

Some ferries

Classes 202 and 203 DEMU - Suitable for rural Regional services

Class 130 DMU - Suitable for anything other than Express/Intercity services

... and more to come!

/Loweffortmoment
